name: Cauliflower-Broccoli Medley
recipeIngredient: 2 small Onions, sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cauliflower and remove the green leaves. Cut the cauliflower into florets, slicing the larger ones into bite-size pieces.
2. Trim off large leaves from the broccoli. Remove the tough ends of the lower stalks and wash the broccoli thoroughly. Cut it into bite-size pieces.
3. Combine the vegetables in a large bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients except the bacon (1/2 cup Mayonnaise, 1/3 cup Vegetable oil, 1/3 cup Vinegar, 1/4 cup Sugar, 1/2 tsp Salt, and 1/4 tsp Pepper).
5. Add the mixture from step 4 to the vegetables in the large bowl, tossing gently.
6. Chill several hours or overnight.
7. Garnish with bacon before serving.
